title: Jump Quantative Trading
author: false-9-
selftext: Sure many of you might of used Cos before, there’s another one recently started called Jump. It’s legitimate, you can make a lot of money from it as long as you don’t get greedy and take your money before it shuts down. There’s another one started up called Jump, https://jumptdd1.top/#/register?code=9G4ALL If you need a hand setting up let me know
